dog.general: Dogs are active and need daily exercise, socialization, and mental stimulation.

age_specific.young: Puppies need frequent short walks and playtime.
age_specific.adult: Adult dogs benefit from morning walks and afternoon play.
age_specific.senior: Older dogs need gentler exercise and more rest periods.

tasks.walk: Daily walks help prevent obesity and provide mental stimulation.
tasks.feed: Dogs should be fed 2-3 times daily with portion control.
tasks.groom: Regular brushing prevents matting and skin issues.

cat.general: Cats are independent but need daily interaction and litter maintenance.

age_specific.young: Kittens need playtime and kitten food.
age_specific.adult: Adult cats enjoy hunting games and clean litter.
age_specific.senior: Older cats need softer food and less stressful environments.

tasks.litter: Clean litter daily to prevent health issues.
tasks.play: Interactive play prevents boredom and obesity.
tasks.feed: Cats prefer multiple small meals throughout the day.

rabbit.general: Rabbits need space to hop and hay-based diet.

age_specific.young: Baby rabbits need constant hay and gentle handling.
age_specific.adult: Adult rabbits need daily exercise and fresh veggies.
age_specific.senior: Older rabbits need softer hay and vet checkups.
